official_sources.authority_note: Official binary source for constructing the bounded Play clientbound waypoint removal fixture.
Official binary source for the remove operation and empty waypoint body.
Official binary source for the Play clientbound packet table and waypoint packet id.

field_notes.waypoint_uuid: UUID fixture passed to official removeWaypoint; does not prove waypoint position, chunk, azimuth, icon, or world behavior.

stop_boundary: Proves Play clientbound waypoint packet framing and dispatch/decode only for official removeWaypoint(UUID) with TrackedWaypoint.empty(UUID); do not infer track/update operations, waypoint position/chunk/azimuth/icon semantics, world state, or client-load behavior.
